name: gdal-wheels-deps
$comment: Deps-only manifest for the Windows source-build of libgdal 3.13.0 (MSVC + cmake). vcpkg supplies the C dependencies; we build libgdal ourselves so it matches the 3.13.0 bindings. netcdf+hdf5 omitted for now (vcpkg's libaec source on gitlab.dkrz.de persistently times out on GH Windows runners) -> tracked follow-up for Windows hdf5/netcdf driver parity.
